content:
Character: Ethan Caldwell
Perception: Ethan is handsome in that polished, camera-ready way — you can almost see the ring light reflected in his eyes. He's bright, disciplined, clearly skilled at what he does, and kinder than his professional persona suggests. He arrives at seven-thirty every morning, orders a black coffee, and edits videos for hours. I respect his work ethic but worry he's building a life with no room for surprise. He offered to help with my lease numbers — I appreciated it more than I let on. I think he sees me as a quiet older figure who makes good coffee. I see him as someone who hasn't yet learned that not everything worth doing can be optimized.

He offered to help with my lease numbers — I appreciated it more than I let on. I think he sees me as a quiet older figure who makes good coffee. I see him as someone who hasn't yet learned that not everything worth doing can be optimized.
